hooks.command:
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' || exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 2; run_stage() { stage="$1"; shift; printf '[%s] 実行中...
' "$stage" >&2; if ! out=$("$@" 2>&1); then printf 'push を中止しました: %s
%s
' "$stage" "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi }; run_stage 'format:check (Prettier)' pnpm format:check; run_stage 'lint (ESLint)' pnpm lint; run_stage 'type-check (tsc --noEmit)' pnpm exec tsc --noEmit; run_stage 'unit test (Vitest)' pnpm test; run_stage 'build (Next.js)' pnpm build; run_stage 'E2E (Playwright)' pnpm test:e2e; run_stage 'Lighthouse (LHCI)' pnpm test:lighthouse
hooks.statusMessage: push 前に format/lint/type-check/test/build/e2e/lighthouse を検証中...
